pages.text: Dormant: grants bonus Armor and Knockback Resistance, but slightly slows the wearer. It also ignores minor chip damage from cactus, stalagmites, sweet berry bushes, and suffocation-like wall damage.

Awakened: while Branded, taking a solid non-magic hit builds $(l)Impact$(). Impact increases your next melee hit, and when that hit lands it bursts into a short shockwave that knocks back and damages nearby enemies.
Weakness: magic hurts more than normal while using the Heart.
